name: Zhuzhou Smelter Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhuzhou Smelter Group Co.,Ltd. produces and sells lead, zinc, and alloy products in China. The company offers lead, zinc, and silver ingots under the Torch brand. It is also involved in the recovery of copper, gold, silver, bismuth, cadmium, indium, tellurium, and other rare metals and sulfuric acid. The company is based in Zhuzhou, China.
